title: Improved Gameplay
description: This modpack brings features to Minecraft that should be in the base game to make the perfect gameplay!
body:
## Features 📎
This modpack comes with features such as animated characters, 3d items, enchantment outlines, blinking (Fresh Moves Animated Eyes Wiki: https://github.com/IthanMendoza/Fresh-Moves/wiki), and more!

*Other Features:*
* Baby Animals
* Better explosions
* Fancy beds
* Better creepers
* "Blocky" armor stands (with arms!)
* Visible saturation ([Apple Skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin))

## Performance 🚀
This modpack includes mods such as [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) and other mods so lag wont bother you!

## Compatibility 🌐
This mod is a **client side mod!** Meaning you can play this on any server you would like!
